html:
The Belt of Hunger is a wearable Magic item. It requires 6 Slurper Pelts, 2 Rope, and 2 Nightmare Fuel to craft and a Shadow Manipulator to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 63% of its durability.

While worn, it restores Sanity by 2/min and reduces Hunger loss by 40%.

Using the belt with characters that lose Hunger at a normal rate (75/day) will make them lose only 45 points per day.


Tips

  • Because Slurpers do not respawn without resetting the ruins by killing the Ancient Fuelweaver, it's recommended to use the Sewing Kit on the Belt of Hunger to repair it rather than letting it degrade and crafting a new one.
  • A single use of the Sewing Kit restores enough durability to prevent 151 points worth of hunger drain, comparable to Meaty Stew. This makes sewing a Belt of Hunger an extremely efficient way prevent starvation.
  • The Belt of Hunger is very useful for Wigfrid and Wes, due to the former's inability to eat non-Meaty foods and the latter's decreased maximum Hunger.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Willow wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wendy wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • WX-78 wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Woodie wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wes wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Maxwell wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Webber wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Walani wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Warly wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wilbur wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wilba wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wormwood wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wheeler wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Winona wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wortox wearing a Belt of Hunger.
  • Wurt wearing a Belt of Hunger.

Don't Starve

Belt of Hunger
"Keep that belly full."
Object Info
Perk
Reduces hunger loss by 40%.
Restores sanity over time.
+2/minute
8 days
Repaired By Sewing
Does not stack
Crafting
×6 ×2 ×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"armorslurper"
“A soggy, sustaining, succulent suit.”
–Wilson
“Oh, ick! Ick! Ick! Ick! Eeeeeewwwwww!”
–Willow
“It moves with my many muscles!”
–Wolfgang
“A clinging, dreary, living suit.”
–Wendy
“FURRY INSULATION FOR MY WIRES.”
–WX-78
“A disgusting and magical garment.”
–Wickerbottom
“It tickles. I think it's still alive.”
–Woodie
“Wet, soggy, and oddly filling.”
–Maxwell
“This dark fuel could truly solve the world's hunger problems.”
–Wagstaff
“She ebbs the ache öf hunger. Gööd fur.”
–Wigfrid
“Squeeze our tummy tight!”
–Webber
“So efficient!”
–Walani
“Ah. My appetite wanes under its protection.”
–Warly
“How bad do I wanna protect myself?”
–Woodlegs
“MAKETH WILBA HAIRY AND SAFE”
–Wilba
“Furry belt. Looks good”
–Wormwood
“It'll be all the rage in Paris.”
–Wheeler
“So tight I barely remember the gnawing hunger!”
–Winona
“If it means I eat less often, count me in!”
–Wortox
“Good belt, glorp.”
–Wurt
“The smell kind of ruins my appetite.”
–Walter
“I guess I'll swallow my pride and wear it...”
–Wanda
The Belt of Hunger is a wearable Magic item. It requires 6 Slurper Pelts, 2 Rope, and 2 Nightmare Fuel to craft and a Shadow Manipulator to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 63% of its durability.
While worn, it restores Sanity by 2/min and reduces Hunger loss by 40%.
Using the belt with characters that lose Hunger at a normal rate (75/day) will make them lose only 45 points per day.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Because Slurpers do not respawn without resetting the ruins by killing the Ancient Fuelweaver, it's recommended to use the Sewing Kit on the Belt of Hunger to repair it rather than letting it degrade and crafting a new one.
A single use of the Sewing Kit restores enough durability to prevent 151 points worth of hunger drain, comparable to Meaty Stew. This makes sewing a Belt of Hunger an extremely efficient way prevent starvation.
The Belt of Hunger is very useful for Wigfrid and Wes, due to the former's inability to eat non-Meaty foods and the latter's decreased maximum Hunger.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thắt lưng Đói là một vật phẩm Phép thuật có thể đeo được. Nó cần 6 Tấm Slurper, 2 Dây thừng và 2 Nhiên liệu Ác mộng để chế tạo và một Bộ điều khiển Bóng tối để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 63% độ bền của nó.
